  -n, --namespace    Required. Namespace base for created files (e.g
                     Something.Foo.Features), 'Blocks' and 'Pages' are added

  -b, --blockbase    Required. Fully qualified namespace of Block abstract class

  -p, --pagebase     Required. Fully qualified namespace of Page abstract class

  --blockvm          Required. Fully qualified namespace of Block viewmodel base
                     class

                     class

  --version          Display version information.
